tooltips.alignmentChargeMinDays: Alignment prorated periods shorter than the specified number of days won't be charged.
tooltips.alignmentProrationPolicy: Controls whether alignment prorated periods are charged.
tooltips.alignmentType:
Enables billing cycle alignment.

Immediate. A prorated period is created first to align the billing cycle. The following period is a normal billing period.

Delayed. A normal billing period is created first. The following period is prorated to align the billing cycle.
tooltips.invoiceLeadTimeDays: How many days in advance of the next billing cycle the invoice is created.
tooltips.billingCycleLength: Number of charge periods within a billing cycle. For example, if the cycle length is set to 12 and the charge period is 1 month, the customer will receive one invoice per year.
